labels.name: genericApiErrorMessage
labels.value: Something went wrong. Try again or contact customer support for help.

labels.name: emptyDefaultDeliveryGroupErrorMessage
labels.value: The default delivery group must contain at least one item.

labels.name: shipToOneAddressModalMessage
labels.value: You'll return to the checkout page and any additional items added will move to your default shipment. If you're logged in, new addresses are saved to your account.
